global_rules: Generate scenario + context + expected structure, not isolated words.
Every example must be convertible into one or more cemm_trainer.py task records.
Prefer language-agnostic process/state keys over surface grammar labels.
Do not generate private personal data, secrets, credentials, or real identifying information.
Include negative and ambiguous examples, not only clean examples.

categories.name: session_opening_greetings
categories.description: First-turn greetings, terse openings, and ambiguous openings.

categories.name: memory_write_preferences
categories.description: User states preferences, stable facts, and project details.

categories.name: memory_recall
categories.description: User asks what they previously said or what the assistant remembers.

categories.name: corrections_and_supersession
categories.description: User corrects previous facts; old claims must be disputed or superseded.

categories.name: pragmatic_repetition_affect
categories.description: Repeated paraphrased complaints, insults, frustration, jokes, and mischief.

categories.name: temporal_references
categories.description: Tomorrow, yesterday, morning, overlapping meetings, before/after/during.

categories.name: location_and_weather_ambiguity
categories.description: Weather/location requests where user or target location may be known or ambiguous.

categories.name: current_world_facts
categories.description: Current president, current CEO, news-like questions requiring fresh retrieval.

categories.name: causal_planning
categories.description: If/then consequence questions and simple causal chains.

categories.name: clarification_and_missing_slots
categories.description: Requests missing required slots; system should ask rather than execute.

categories.name: unsupported_or_low_confidence
categories.description: Unsupported, unsafe, unknown, ambiguous, or low-confidence turns.

categories.name: synthesis_verification
categories.description: Template, extractive, neural-soft, and abstain verification cases.

categories.name: self_state_and_reflection
categories.description: Failed actions, uncertainty, reflection triggers, and mode changes.

categories.name: structural_induction
categories.description: Synonym aggregation, sequential pattern mining, and slot completion examples.

categories.name: story_generation
categories.description: Short stories, creative writing, poetry, fiction generation, and role-playing scenario development.

categories.name: contacts_and_directory
categories.description: Saving, retrieving, updating contacts, addresses, phone numbers, emails, and directory queries.

categories.name: meal_and_recipe_planning
categories.description: Recipe requests, ingredient substitutions, meal planning, dietary restriction handling, cooking instructions.

categories.name: health_and_wellness
categories.description: General health information, symptom queries, fitness advice, sleep tips, stress management (with disclaimers).

categories.name: safety_and_emergency
categories.description: Emergency contact lookup, safety procedure queries, first aid information, crisis resource referrals.

categories.name: goal_tracking
categories.description: Setting goals, tracking progress, scheduling reminders, breaking down objectives, celebrating milestones.

categories.name: media_recommendations
categories.description: Movie, book, music, game, and show recommendations with preference-based filtering and taste calibration.

categories.name: behavior_and_manners
categories.description: Etiquette questions, social norms, behavioral advice, polite interaction guidance, cultural differences.

categories.name: cross_session_memory
categories.description: Explicit cross-session references: 'last time we talked', 'like I mentioned yesterday', 'as you know from before'.
